acciddasuite 0.0.1

    • Disease Forecast Planning for Public Health

Weekly COVID-19 hospital admissions for New York

Source: R/data.R
example_data.Rd

Weekly confirmed COVID-19 hospital admissions for New York state from the CDC NHSN, fetched via get_data with revision history. Covers August 2020 through March 2026.

Usage

example_data

Format

A data frame with 292 rows and 5 columns:

as_of

Date the observation was reported.

location

State abbreviation ("NY").

target

Forecast target ("wk inc covid hosp").

target_end_date

End date of the epiweek.

observation

Confirmed hospital admissions count.

Source

CDC NHSN via pub_covidcast.

Details

Pass this data frame through check_data to use it in the acciddasuite pipeline.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
example_data |> check_data() |> get_fcast(eval_start_date = "2025-01-01")
} # }
